prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约5597名、6115名、6528名、6085名、6740名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2021至2023年位次持续下滑（从5597后移至 6528），2024年短暂回升至6085，2025年再度后移至6740，近两年累计后移约655名，2025年基准位次约6740名；北京科技大学在北京市的综合类招生计划：202 1–2023年均为193人，2024年增至198人，2025年增至207人；2026年计划216人，较2025年扩招9人（增幅约4.35%），连续三年小幅扩招，但扩招幅度远低于同期北京市 考生增幅。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京科技大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第35名，近年排名稳定在33–36名区间，属于全国顶尖理工类211院校，综合实 力接近中游985水平；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及国家卫健委通报的伪造成绩单和抄袭学位论文事件，对学校管理形象有一定影响；但抖音平台热度极 高，总排名第1（高热），毕业典礼撑伞等暖心视频传播广泛，整体关注度处于高位。历史投档异常记录中未见北京科技大学断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，冶 金工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、科学技术史A+、环境科学与工程A-，共4个A类学科（其中3个A+），材料、冶金等王牌学科与招生专业中的材料科学与工程、材料智能技术、纳米 材料与技术等高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、人工智能、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与北科大优势工科方向契合；材料/冶金类属传统工 科，社会热度一般；北京市2026年高考报名人数约84900人，较2025年65434人增长约29.7%，竞争显著加剧；北京科技大学位于 北京市，为本市考生提供了明显的地域偏好优势，作为驻京211高校在京招生规模较大（2026年计划216人），对本市考生吸引力较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋 势、2026年扩招4.35%但北京市考生大幅增长29.7%导致供需关系趋紧、抖音高热反映关注度上升、声誉偏负面略有影响等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年6740名基础上继 续后移。预测最低位次约7000名，区间6500–7500名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 理科试验班（拔尖人才计划）
- 工科试验班类（卓越工程人才）
- 人工智能
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、信息安全、物联网工程）
- 数学类（应用数学和统计）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 自动化类（含自动化、测控技术与仪器、智能感知工程）
- 通信工程
- 机械类（机器人、智能制造与新能源车辆）
- 材料科学与工程
- 大数据管理与应用（大数据与金融试验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工商管理类（数智管理试验班）
- 社会科学试验班（含法学、知识产权、行政管理、社会工作）
- 外国语言文学类（含英语、日语、德语）
- 能源动力类（含能源与动力工程、新能源科学与工程、环境工程、环境科学）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约7000名，区间6500–7500名。位次在区间下限（6500名以内）可重点冲刺一档的理科试验班、人工智能、计算机类等热门专业；位次在7000名左右建议以二档的自动化 类、通信工程、材料科学与工程为主攻方向；位次接近区间上限（7500名）建议以三档专业保底，同时关注二档中位次要求相对较低的工商管理类、社会科学试验班等。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the comprehensive category in Beijing were approximately 5597, 6115, 6528, 6085, and 6740, showing an overall fluctuating backward trend. Rankings declined continuously from 2021 to 2023 (from 5597 to 6528), briefly recovered to 6085 in 2024, then moved back to 6740 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 655 places over the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 6740. The comprehensive enrollment plan of University of Science and Technology Beijing in Beijing: 193 students each year from 2021 to 2023, increased to 198 in 2024, and to 207 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 216 students, an increase of 9 students (about 4.35%) compared to 2025, with small expansions for three consecutive years, but the expansion rate is far lower than the growth rate of Beijing examinees in the same period.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: University of Science and Technology Beijing is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 35th, with stable rankings in the 33–36 range in recent years. It is a top national science and engineering 211 university, with comprehensive strength close to mid-level 985 universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving incidents of forged transcripts and plagiarized degree theses reported by the National Health Commission, which have some impact on the school's management image. However, its popularity on the Douyin platform is extremely high, ranking first overall (high heat), with heartwarming videos such as umbrella-holding at graduation ceremonies spreading widely, resulting in overall high attention. No signs of a cutoff gap for University of Science and Technology Beijing have been found in historical admission anomaly records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Metallurgical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, History of Science and Technology A+, and Environmental Science and Engineering A-, totaling 4 A-class disciplines (including 3 A+), with flagship disciplines such as Materials and Metallurgy highly correlated with the enrollment majors of Materials Science and Engineering, Materials Intelligent Technology, and Nanomaterials and Technology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, aligning with USTB's advantageous engineering directions. Materials/Metallurgy are traditional engineering fields with average social popularity. The number of Beijing college entrance examination registrants in 2026 is about 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% from 65,434 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. University of Science and Technology Beijing is located in Beijing, providing obvious regional preference advantages for local candidates. As a Beijing-based 211 university, it has a relatively large enrollment scale in Beijing (216 students planned for 2026), making it highly attractive to local candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, the 4.35% enrollment expansion in 2026 but a 29.7% surge in Beijing examinees leading to tighter supply-demand dynamics, high Douyin heat reflecting increased attention, and a slightly negative reputation, the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is expected to continue moving back from the 2025 baseline of 6740. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 7000, with a range of 6500–7500.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Science Experimental Class (Top Talent Program)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Outstanding Engineering Talents)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Internet of Things Engineering)
- Mathematics (Applied Mathematics and Statistics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Automation (including Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Intelligent Perception Engineering)
- Communication Engineering
- Mechanical Engineering (Robotics, Intelligent Manufacturing and New Energy Vehicles)
- Materials Science and Engineering
- Big Data Management and Application (Big Data and Finance Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Business Administration (Digital Intelligence Management Experimental Class)
- Social Science Experimental Class (including Law, Intellectual Property, Public Administration, Social Work)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (including English, Japanese, German)
- Energy and Power (including Energy and Power Engineering, New Energy Science and Engineering, Environmental Engineering, Environmental Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking around 7000, range 6500–7500. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 6500) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Science Experimental Class, Artificial Intelligence, and Computer Science. Candidates around 7000 are advised to target Tier 2 majors like Automation, Communication Engineering, and Materials Science and Engineering as main directions. Candidates near the upper end of the range (7500) are advised to secure Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also considering Tier 2 majors with relatively lower ranking requirements such as Business Administration and Social Science Experimental Class.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Science and Technology Beijing
